question_text: Does your organization currently use AI tools?
In how many functional areas is AI currently deployed?
Are any AI systems customer-facing or public?
Are AI tools connected to your CRM or core business systems?
Are AI outputs stored and reusable in your systems?
Do AI tools pull from internal data sources or knowledge bases?
Does AI directly support lead generation or revenue operations?
Can you tie any AI activity to measurable business KPIs?
Is AI used in any revenue-critical workflow (sales/conversion/retention)?
Do AI tools trigger follow-up actions automatically?
Are multiple tools connected via Zapier/Make/API/native automations?
Are there multi-step AI workflows in place?
Do you have internal guidelines for AI use?
Are important AI outputs reviewed by humans?
Is anyone explicitly responsible for AI oversight?
Does your company disclose AI use to customers?
Are AI prompts standardized or documented?
Are AI outputs logged or recorded?
Is sensitive data filtered before AI processing?
Are AI models/tools approved before company use?
Are AI policies documented internally?
Does leadership understand AI beyond content generation?
Can leaders identify 3+ high-value AI use cases?
Are team members trained in prompt design or AI workflows?
Can staff distinguish between experimentation and production AI?
Are repeatable AI workflows documented?
Are teams coached on AI-caused role changes?
Is there a structured AI training cadence?
Are teams evaluated on AI-assisted productivity?
Does AI produce customer-facing content automatically?
Does AI interact with customers autonomously?
Does AI process customer personal data?
Are AI outputs reviewed before publishing?
Do you have incident response logic for AI failures?
